topic: Kernel-verified Lean proof closing an open sorry in Erdős Problem 828 (formal-conjectures)

artifacts.title: Lean 4 proof of Erdos828 phi_dvd_self_iff_pow2_pow3 (φ(n)∣n characterization), kernel-verified

metadata.method: 2-adic valuation: 2∣n (else φ even ∤ odd n); n=2^a·m, φn=2^(a-1)·φm; v2(φm)≤1 forces ≤1 odd prime of m (two would give 4∣φm); m=p^k with (p-1)∣2p ⟹ (p-1)∣2 ⟹ p=3

candidate_claims.assertion: The Lean 4 theorem `Erdos828.erdos_828.variants.phi_dvd_self_iff_pow2_pow3` is proven and kernel-verified (axioms: propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound; no sorryAx): for n : ℕ, Euler's totient φ(n) divides n if and only if n ≤ 1 or n = 2^a · 3^b for some a > 0 and b ≥ 0. Closes a previously-open `sorry` (category: textbook) in google-deepmind/formal-conjectures Erdős Problem 828.
caveats: The textbook φ(n)∣n characterization, not the open Erdős 828 conjecture (infinitely-many-n for φ(n)∣n+a) nor Lehmer's conjecture, both of which remain sorry.
Kernel-verified locally; upstream PR (hosted-fork route, 157 lines) requires the maintainer's action.
